summary: Customer-focused Field Service Engineer and Desktop Support Specialist with 10+ years of hands-on IT experience across corporate office, field, and manufacturing environments. Specialized in mobile device fleet support, walkup and deskside assistance, and end-to-end asset lifecycle management. Currently supporting mobile and endpoint operations at Daimler Truck LLC's Portland headquarters, possessing direct domain expertise in Daimler systems, the IT Shop portal, and security profiles. Expert in ordering, provisioning, and setting up devices using iOS/macOS tools, MDM platforms, Active Directory, Entra ID, and Proxmox VE / vSphere virtualization.

bullets: Provide customer-first walkup, deskside, and remote support for corporate users, resolving mobile device, OS, and software issues under strict SLA targets.
Order, receive, and provision mobile device fleet inventory (iOS, macOS, and Windows) for corporate end-users, remote workers, and new hires.
Setup and configure client endpoints using enterprise macOS/iOS tools, configuration profiles, and MDM platforms (Intune, MobileIron, Ivanti).
Execute hardware decommissioning and device retirement processes, ensuring secure data wiping, asset de-registration, and resource reclamation.
Utilize Daimler systems and the internal IT Shop portal to manage asset lifecycles, assign hardware, and resolve ticket escalations under strict SLAs.
Develop and enhance user-facing setup guides in Confluence to streamline self-service deployments and remote enrollment.
Managed high-volume walkup helpdesk operations, providing onsite desktop, laptop, and peripheral support via walk-ins and ServiceNow tickets.
Managed the lifecycle of desktop and mobile assets, from initial hardware ordering, provisioning, and Ivanti imaging to secure device retirement.
Administered Windows Server environments (Active Directory, DNS, DHCP, GPOs) and Entra ID (Azure AD); automated user provisioning routines with PowerShell.
Installed and administered Meraki SD-WAN devices and resolved local networking issues (IP addressing, DNS, DHCP, VLANs).
Setup, configured, and troubleshot Zoom/Teams conference rooms, A/V equipment, and Cisco VoIP infrastructure.

experience.role: Network / Microsoft Technology Lab Volunteer Technician
bullets: Troubleshot Cisco routing and switching hardware, Microsoft Active Directory forests, and Linux servers.
Diagnosed, replaced, and maintained Cisco physical hardware (HWICs, SMART-Serial, interfaces).
Performed rack and hardware maintenance including SAN hot-swapping and UPS battery replacement.

experience.company: MoJoe Enterprises LLC / Rock That Media LLC
bullets: Executed login scripts, managed client system rollouts, and configured Windows desktop environments.
Investigated and diagnosed operating system and hardware performance issues.
Administered local systems infrastructure and trained staff on network security awareness.
